betaAccess.title: Join the Closed Beta
betaAccess.description: Follow these 3 steps to access the beta version of ProfeVision Mobile. You can also grade exams directly from your mobile phone browser at profevision.com

step1.title: Join the testers group
step1.description: Click the button and request to join the Google group

step2.title: Accept being a tester
step2.description: Access the testing program and accept to participate

step3.title: Download the app
step3.description: Install ProfeVision Mobile from Google Play Store

scan.title: Scan anywhere
scan.description: From the mobile app or your web browser

dashboard.title: Personal Dashboard
dashboard.description: Performance metrics, plan usage, and quick access to all your features

subjects.title: Subjects & Groups
subjects.description: Organize your courses with hierarchical view: Subjects, Groups, Exams

exams.title: Exam List
exams.description: Search, filter and manage all your exams with detailed information

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Dark mode, 4 languages available, OTA updates

scan.title: Smart Scanning
scan.description: Step-by-step guide with tips for best results

cta.title: Start grading faster
cta.description: Download the app and connect with your ProfeVision account
